diagrams.title: Linear Queue Operations
diagrams.description: Shows insertion (enqueue) at rear and deletion (dequeue) from front in a linear queue array
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic queue mechanics and pointer movements

diagrams.title: Circular Queue State Diagram
diagrams.description: Circular representation showing front and rear pointers wrapping around the array
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how circular queue reuses space through wrap-around

diagrams.title: Linked List Queue Implementation
diagrams.description: Shows nodes linked with front and rear pointers in linked list based queue
diagrams.purpose: Understanding dynamic queue implementation with pointers

diagrams.title: Queue Full vs Empty States
diagrams.description: Compares empty queue and full queue conditions in circular queue
diagrams.purpose: Distinguishing between full and empty queue conditions
